compact_findings.finding: RUFLO is strategically relevant but too high-risk for runtime wiring without isolated audit.
Auto Browser aligns best with supervised browser control; Obscura should not be first adapter.
Compact shared memory should carry decisions and pointers, not full transcripts.
The safest N+3.1 slice is action-intent plumbing, not Auto Browser execution.

current_priorities: Prove native multi-agent coordination with compact memory.
Build ActionIntent and CapabilityAdapter before external adapters.
Implement ActionIntent and CapabilityAdapter before external tool integration.
Use compact file-based memory instead of repeating giant context.
Keep each agent job narrow and artifact-backed.
project_truth: Ghoti is local-first, supervised, and approval-gated.
External repos/tools are reference-only unless explicitly approved and integrated later.
Observations and model outputs do not authorize actions.
Native multi-agent MVP is deterministic and repo-local.
